{{CargoRelic
|name=Chan-hee's Figure
|class_id=20093
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Before being split in half by Hitman One, Chan-hee was a youthful and beautiful anchor, and this figure perfectly depicts how she looked like at that time. Since Chan-hee 1/2 and Demon Chan-hee took over, this figurine became even more valuable.
|fame=15
|art=12
|fth=17
|civ=31
|tech=15
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +5<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +10<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +15<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +15<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +15<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
